lanes.label: Buy & Hold BTC
lanes.note: Perfect HODL — the formal bench benchmark. Raw return king, but 84% max drawdown.

lanes.label: Graduated Core Regime (80/70/0)
lanes.note: RISK_ON=80%, ACCUMULATE=70%, RISK_OFF=0%. Beats HODL on Sharpe (1.19 vs 1.08) and Calmar (0.92 vs 0.77). Max DD improved from 84% to 58%.

lanes.label: Graduated Core + Tactical Overlay
lanes.note: The full product candidate. Core regime + 4H tactical overlay. Best Sharpe (1.20) and Calmar (0.96) of any lane. Captures 56% of HODL's return with 30% less drawdown.

lanes.label: Binary Core Regime (in/out)
lanes.note: Original binary regime — superseded by graduated. Kept for reference.

lanes.label: Tactical 4H TSMOM (standalone)
lanes.note: Not viable as standalone sleeve. Overlay only.

lanes.label: Core-Gated Tactical (binary)
lanes.note: Binary core gates tactical. Superseded by graduated core + tactical.
